case_title: TONY YIP VS. REBEKAH THOMSON et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YIP, TONY AS TO DEFENDANT THOMSON, REBEKAH DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
